traceability_rows.trace_rule: approved compiler subject hash is the direct upstream assurance boundary
traceability_rows.test_obligation: candidate-check with P3-SPEC-COMPILER review decision passes

traceability_rows.trace_rule: compiler conservation, manifest, hash index, and QA boundary refs must be listed before final assurance
traceability_rows.test_obligation: missing compiler output ref is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: QA can report findings but cannot mutate compiled artifacts
traceability_rows.test_obligation: forbidden QA write or mutation is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: each implementation duty binds one clause, rule, projection, code target, validator, test, command, and invalidation policy
traceability_rows.test_obligation: broad or incomplete trace rows are rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: every trace row has matching positive and negative test obligations
traceability_rows.test_obligation: missing negative case or mismatched validator check is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: code targets must stay inside allowed paths and outside forbidden paths
traceability_rows.test_obligation: orphan or forbidden code targets are rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: future workpacks reference trace rows and cannot broaden scope beyond their envelope
traceability_rows.test_obligation: workpack with missing trace rows or incomplete policies is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: generated_at values used in reviewed indexes come from reviewed release identity, assurance run id, or input-bundle-derived generation id rather than wall-clock or machine-local values
skills constrain execution but cannot become source, validator, review, lock, or promotion authority
exceptions require affected row ids, scope delta, reason, requested workpack, and human gate decision
SPEC_LOCK, BUILD_LOCK, validator, test, workpack, skill, and release dependency drift invalidates affected rows
human gate sees compiler readiness, QA status, traceability status, exceptions, and explicit lock readiness
traceability_rows.test_obligation: packet lacking lock readiness or unresolved findings is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: assurance may report readiness but cannot create locks without a separate explicit request
traceability_rows.test_obligation: spec candidate lock creation is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: future P3-IMPL-ASSURANCE derives allowed paths, validators, tests, and commands from approved assurance spec and lock
traceability_rows.test_obligation: implementation handoff remains blocked until approved review and lock
